title: papaver somniferum f. album
intro: Papaver somniferum f. album, also known as the white poppy, is a variety of the opium poppy plant (Papaver somniferum), a flowering plant native to Asia and Europe. This plant contains medicinal properties, including alkaloids like thebaine, noscapine, and papaverine, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum f. album include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help with coughs and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although proper dosing and caution are necessary due to the plant's opium content.
